title: Turboot's Cobblemon Modpack
description: Modpack to be able to play on the Cobblemon server in the Turboot Network. You may also use this for your own server.
body:
## Turboot's Cobblemon Modpack

Use this modpack to join the Cobblemon server in the Turboot Network. You may also use this modpack to inspire yourself or to use it for your own server.

Server IP: **mc.turboot.com**

---

### Socials:

- [Turboot Website](https://turboot.com 'Turboot Website')
- [Discord](https://discord.gg/QdWQQpDzTw)
- [Github](https://github.com/Turbootzz)
- [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ThijsHerman1)

---

### Mods Included in Modpack
<details>
<summary>Show List</summary>

#### Main Mods:
- [AdvancementInfo](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancementinfo)
- [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)
- [Cobblemon Fight or Flight](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-fight-or-flight)
- [Cobblemon Intergrations](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-integrations)
- [Cobblemon Spawn notification](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-spawn-notification)
- [Cobblemon Ascension Megamons](https://modrinth.com/mod/ascension-megamons/version/1.2.1)
- [Cobblemon Unchained](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-unchained)
- [Cobblepedia](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblepedia/version/bcBAQntR)
- [Cobbledex: Recrafted](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobbledex/version/KSCbcoi2)
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
- [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium)
- [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- [Memory Leak Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix)
- [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling)
- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options)
- [Roughly Enough Items (REI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei)
- [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip)
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [Starlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight)
- [Stendhal](https://modrinth.com/mod/stendhal)
- [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith)
- [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality)
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)
- [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)
- [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)
- [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify)

#### Dependencies:
- [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [Cobblemon Counter](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-counter/version/1.4-fabric-1.5.0)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [Patchouli](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli)
- [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)
</details>
